task_description: A cascading outage affected all services starting at 05:39 UTC. The 'notification-worker' service crashed repeatedly, propagating failures through the dependency chain.

commits.author: alice@company.com
commits.message: refactor: optimize rate limiter for high throughput
commits.diff:
--- a/notification-worker-service/rate_limiter.go
+++ b/notification-worker-service/rate_limiter.go
-// Old: stable configuration
-config.MaxSize = 100
-config.Timeout = 30 * time.Second
+// New: reduced limits for 'optimization'
+config.MaxSize = 12
+config.Timeout = 4 * time.Second
+// WARNING: This may cause issues under high load
